revision.comment: [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2024 November 9#Template:Puffery]] closed as merge ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.16|XFDcloser]])
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{redirect|Template:AD|the [[calendar era]] template|Template:CE}}</noinclude>{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
{{Ambox
| name = Promotional
| type = content
| class= ambox-Advert
| issue= This {{{1|article}}} '''contains [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not#Wikipedia is not a soapbox or means of promotion|{{#if:{{{2|{{{type|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{type}}}}}}|promotional content}}]]'''.
| fix  = Please help [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} improve it] by removing [[WP:Spam|promotional language]] and inappropriate [[Wikipedia:External links#Advertising and conflicts of interest|external links]], and by adding encyclopedic text written from a [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|neutral point of view]].
| removalnotice = yes
| cat  = Articles with a promotional tone
| date = {{{date|}}}
| all  = All articles with a promotional tone
}}
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{redirect|Template:AD|the [[calendar era]] template|Template:CE}}</noinclude>{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
{{Ambox
| name = Promotional
| type = content
| class= ambox-Advert
| issue= This {{{1|article}}} '''contains [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not#Wikipedia is not a soapbox or means of promotion|{{#if:{{{2|{{{type|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{type}}}}}}|promotional content}}]]'''.
| fix  = Please help [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} improve it] by removing [[WP:Spam|promotional language]] and inappropriate [[Wikipedia:External links#Advertising and conflicts of interest|external links]], and by adding encyclopedic text written from a [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|neutral point of view]].
| removalnotice = yes
| cat  = Articles with a promotional tone
| date = {{{date|}}}
| all  = All articles with a promotional tone
}}
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Hatnotes should be in documentation subpage
Hatnotes should be in documentation subpage
1 revision imported: trying to get the ambox in
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things

revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = Promotional | type = content | class= ambox-Advert | issue= This {{{1|article}}} '''contains [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not#Wikipedia is not a soapbox or means of promotion|{{#if:{{{2|{{{type|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{type}}}}}}|promotional content}}]]'''. | fix = Please help [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} improve it] by removing [[WP:Spam|promotional language]] and inappropriate [[Wikipedia:External links#Advertising and conflicts of interest|external links]], and by adding encyclopedic text written from a [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|neutral point of view]]. | removalnotice = yes | cat = Articles with a promotional tone | date = {{{date|}}} | all = All articles with a promotional tone }} }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Ambox transclusions]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Promotional]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
